metadata.name: Handle a Truck Arriving with No Appointment

description: A truck arrives at the gate but does not have a Vehicle Booking System (VBS) appointment. The clerk must handle the exception.

nodes.task_description: Verify that no appointment exists for the truck's license plate.

expected_outcome.value: Clerk confirms in the VBS that there is no matching appointment.

nodes.task_description: Inform the driver they cannot enter without an appointment and direct them to the truck parking area.

expected_outcome.value: Clerk clearly communicates the policy to the driver.

nodes.task_description: Advise the driver to contact their dispatch to book an appointment.

expected_outcome.value: Clerk provides instructions for the driver to resolve the issue.
